summary: P0 Purchase Reversal Flow - All tests passed. Backend endpoints (reversal-preview, reverse) working correctly. UI shows proper Delete modal for draft POs and Reverse modal with impacts for non-draft POs.
critical_code_review_comments: Reversal-preview endpoint correctly returns can_delete=true, can_reverse=false for DRAFT PO
Reversal-preview endpoint correctly returns can_delete=false, can_reverse=true for RECEIVED PO
Reversal-preview shows full impacts: stock_movements, ap_records, payments, journals
POST /reverse endpoint validates reason is required
POST /reverse correctly rejects DRAFT PO with error message
UI Delete modal for draft shows 'Hapus PO' button with green DRAFT status banner
UI Reverse modal for non-draft shows 'Reverse PO' button with stock/journal impacts
UI Reverse modal shows 'Alasan Reversal*' as required field
seed_data_creation: None - used existing POs: PO000042 (draft), PO000040 (received)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Purchase Reversal Flow fully implemented and tested. Draft PO = delete modal, Received/Posted PO = reverse modal with impacts. Test PO IDs: Draft=1d4a712d-9e96-440e-8e1f-70826c4d5274 (PO000042), Received=b72e55cb-a217-40ea-a6e6-7c8d6fd8900a (PO000040).
